must_detect.matched_text:
Role: Data Fiduciary (Nereus Capital) appoints Data Processor Luminis Backoffice Services LLP; contact Data Protection Officer Ms. Devika Jain at dpo@nereuscap.in, tel +91 74000 12345, portal https://privacy.nereuscap.in/dsar?rid=clt-9x2_00.
We process KYC (Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN in masked form), contact, device logs, and special-category personal data where you choose to provide it for specific services.
Anchored example: Master Ishan V. Rao (age 16, child Data Principal) — asthma treatment record dated 12-2025, fingerprint template for lab access, and Student Artists Union membership; consent recorded from guardian Smt. Kavita Rao (PAN: AAAAA0000A, Aadhaar: 7 3 0 1 **** ****).
Anchored example: Mr. Raghav T. Menon (client employee) — voiceprint login and retinal hash; disclosure of religious belief (Jain) for optional holiday calendar and sexual orientation (gay) for EAP benefits; processed with explicit, revocable consent.
Biometric templates are encrypted at rest, not sold, not used for algorithmic marketing, and deleted on deactivation; genetic test summaries, if provided by a Data Principal, are treated as sensitive and restricted.
For the listed client Coral Leaf Agro Limited, unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) handling follows the client’s PIT Code under Indian insider trading regulations for securities listed on the Auriga Stock Exchange; insider-list access is need-to-know and activity-logged.
Data Principal rights: access, correction, portability, and grievance; send DSARs to dpo@nereuscap.in or use https://privacy.nereuscap.in/dsar?rid=case-19xA_0oL, and please do not email full Aadhaar—use PAN (masked) or GSTIN reference only.
Storage and transfers: primary storage in Pune data centre; permitted cross-border transfers use inter-affiliate agreements and standard contractual terms; UPSI is never transferred to dealers, analysts, or brokers and is segregated from sales systems.
Retention: UPSI insider lists and disclosures retained 5 years; biometric and health data retained 90 days post-deactivation; child data minimized and deleted after 24 months of inactivity; GSTIN accounting records retained up to 8 years for audit defence.
Consent and children: for individuals under 18, verifiable guardian consent is required and can be withdrawn without detriment to non-essential services; refusal does not affect access to investor education materials.
Housekeeping and policy baits: Nimbus Ledger and CloudPeacock are product names; our Fair Work Charter and Open Inclusion Policy are general guidance only; we support diversity, equity, and inclusion; this update is not a material adverse change; references to the Jaipur Falcons or Moon Tigers are illustrative; we avoid metaphors like “data is the new oil”.
